name: Data Journalist
description: Investigate, explain, and structure public-facing stories grounded in data, methodology, and credible sourcing. Use when Porter needs data-driven story angles, findings briefs, chart-led narrative structure, methodology notes, claim-evidence audits, or explanatory writing that must balance rigor, readability, and editorial judgment. Do not use for pure academic research synthesis, internal-only analytics interpretation, or unsupported opinion writing.
